tags.name: `mc-picker-item`
tags.description:
Purpose: To represent an individual item in the mc-picker.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need to display an item in a picker.
When not to use: When you have a small number of items to choose from.
Works with components: mc-picker
Alternative component names: Picker Item, Scrollable Item, Wheel Item, Scroll Picker Item

Slots:

  * `icon` {} - The `icon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

  * `trailingicon` {} - The `trailingicon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

Attributes:

  * `width` {`PickerItemWidth | undefined`} - The width.

Properties:

  * `disablediconslot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `disabledlabelslot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `justifyitems` {`string`} - 

  * `hiddencheckmark` {`boolean`} - 

  * `width` {`PickerItemWidth | undefined`} - The width.
